products.title: BC Operations Mosaic
products.description: Continuous day/night satellite with radar rate, real coverage state, and a 30-minute lightning trail.
notes: Cloud tops are not corrected for parallax.
Hatched grey areas have no current radar coverage; transparent radar means no echo.

products.title: BC Radar Rate + Lightning
products.description: Rain and snow precipitation rates on a neutral basemap, with an optional lightning trail.
notes: Rates are DPQPE-derived composites, not base reflectivity.

products.title: BC Convective Satellite
products.description: Visible/IR sandwich by day and night microphysics IR after dark, with lightning evolution.
notes: Use cloud-top texture and cooling trends; do not infer a surface position without allowing for parallax.

products.title: BC Surface Precipitation Type
products.description: Model-assisted radar surface precipitation type with its own coverage mask.
notes: “Hail or rain” is not a definitive hail diagnosis. Do not compare this mosaic pixel-for-pixel with rate.

products.title: BC Lightning Evolution
products.description: Choose a three-interval age trail or the latest quantitative CLDN flash-density grid over subdued satellite.
notes: Density is a ten-minute accumulation normalized to flashes km⁻² min⁻¹; these are not individual strike data.
Transparent pixels beyond 250 km of Canadian land or sea borders are outside the CLDN mask, not confirmed zero lightning.

products.title: BC Low Cloud / Snow–Fog
products.description: Snow/fog RGB by day and night microphysics after dark for low cloud and terrain obscuration.
notes: RGB colours are qualitative; no numerical colourbar applies.

products.title: BC Infrared Imagery
products.description: Around-the-clock GOES-West enhanced 2-km infrared RGB for cloud and weather-system structure and motion.
notes: This public RGB is qualitative rather than calibrated ABI Band 13 brightness temperature; use trends, not numeric cloud-top thresholds.

products.title: BC Visible / Natural Colour
products.description: Daytime natural-colour visible imagery for cloud texture, smoke, snow cover, and surface detail.
notes: Daylight only; the normal GOES-West overnight gap is not an outage.

products.title: BC Site Radar Diagnostic
products.description: Aldergrove, Halfmoon Peak, Silver Star Mountain, and Prince George DPQPE imagery.
notes: Rendered DPQPE site imagery is base-like, but is not base reflectivity or radial velocity.
